rule: Never add page-level tabs unless explicitly requested. Left nav handles section navigation.
do: Use tabs only within a page section or detail panel — never at page level unless explicitly requested.
Max 5 visible tabs — add an overflow menu for more.
Active tab: color:#6360D8 with 2px bottom indicator.
Show only one ds-tab-panel at a time — toggle 'active' class via JS.
dont: Never add page-level tabs without an explicit user request.
Never use tabs to replace left nav section switching.
Never exceed 5 visible tabs without an overflow mechanism.
Never use border-radius on tab buttons — indicator is bottom-border only.

react.note: Use Radix Tabs — handles keyboard navigation and ARIA roles automatically.
